\[
x_n = x_{n-1} - x_{n-2} + x_{n-3} - x_{n-4}
\]

We will compute a few terms to identify any potential patterns. Starting with the initial values:

\[
\begin{align*}
x_1 & = 211, \\
x_2 & = 375, \\
x_3 & = 420, \\

\end{align*}
\]

Now, we compute \( x_5 \):

\[
x_5 = x_4 - x_3 + x_2 - x_1 = 523 - 420 + 375 - 211 = 523 - 420 + 375 - 211 = 267.
\]

Next, we compute \( x_6 \):

\[
x_6 = x_5 - x_4 + x_3 - x_2 = 267 - 523 + 420 - 375 = 267 - 523 + 420 - 375 = -211.
\]

\[
x_7 = x_6 - x_5 + x_4 - x_3 = -211 - 267 + 523 - 420 = -211 - 267 + 523 - 420 = -375.
\]

\[

\[

\]

Next, we compute \( x_{10} \):

\[
x_{10} = x_9 - x_8 + x_7 - x_6 = -523 - (-420) + (-375) - (-211) = -523 + 420 - 375 + 211 = -267.
\]

Next, we compute \( x_{11} \):

\[
x_{11} = x_{10} - x_9 + x_8 - x_7 = -267 - (-523) + (-420) - (-375) = -267 + 523 - 420 + 375 = -211.
\]

Next, we compute \( x_{12} \):

\[
x_{12} = x_{11} - x_{10} + x_9 - x_8 = -211 - (-267) + (-523) - (-420) = -211 + 267 - 523 + 420 = -375.
\]

Next, we compute \( x_{13} \):

\[
x_{13} = x_{12} - x_{11} + x_{10} - x_9 = -375 - (-211) + (-267) - (-523) = -375 + 211 - 267 + 523 = -420.
\]

Next, we compute \( x_{14} \):

\[
x_{14} = x_{13} - x_{12} + x_{11} - x_{10} = -420 - (-375) + (-211) - (-267) = -420 + 375 - 211 + 267 = -523.
\]

Next, we compute \( x_{15} \):

\[
x_{15} = x_{14} - x_{13} + x_{12} - x_{11} = -523 - (-420) + (-375) - (-211) = -523 + 420 - 375 + 211 = -267.
\]

From the calculations, we observe that the sequence appears to repeat every 8 terms starting from \( x_5 \):

\[
\begin{align*}
x_5 & = 267, \\
x_6 & = -211, \\
x_7 & = -375, \\
x_8 & = -420, \\
x_9 & = -523, \\
x_{10} & = -267, \\
x_{11} & = -211, \\
x_{12} & = -375.
\end{align*}
\]

Thus, the sequence \( x_n \) for \( n \geq 5 \) is periodic with a period of 8. 

To find \( x_{531} \), \( x_{753} \), and \( x_{975} \), we compute the indices modulo 8:

\[
531 \mod 8 = 3 \quad \Rightarrow \quad x_{531} = x_3 = 420,
\]
\[
753 \mod 8 = 1 \quad \Rightarrow \quad x_{753} = x_1 = 211,
\]
\[
975 \mod 8 = 7 \quad \Rightarrow \quad x_{975} = x_7 = -375.
\]

Now, we can sum these values:

\[
x_{531} + x_{753} + x_{975} = 420 + 211 - 375 = 256.
\]

Thus, the final answer is:

\[
\boxed{256}.
\]```
